channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: Anime News Network Japanese Animation TV Ranking, May 4-10
item.description: Kiki's Delivery Service earns 9.3% rating ― Hayao Miyazaki and Studio Ghibli's Kiki's Delivery Service film aired on NTV on Friday, May 8 at 9:00 p.m. and earned a 9.3% rating. Yoshimi Itazu and... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, May 4-10

item.title: [动画][PV][续作][公开] Anime News Network Hana-Kimi 动画 季度 2的 宣传视频 Video 公开 Theme Songs, July 1 Debut
item.description: Omoinotake trio perform opening "Flashbulb," ending "Hanataba" ― The streamed special for the anime of late manga creator Hisaya Nakajo's Hana-Kimi manga presented a promotional video for its second... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Hana-Kimi Anime Season 2's Promo Video Unveils Theme Songs, July 1 Debut

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network Takopi的 Original Sin 动画 Gets Compilation Film
item.description: Film to compile 6 episodes with added scenes ― The official website for the anime of Taizan 5's Takopi's Original Sin (Takopii no Genzai) manga announced on Saturday that the anime will have a... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Takopi's Original Sin Anime Gets Compilation Film

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Akane-banashi 动画 公开 追加 English Dub 声优阵容
item.description: Kellen Goff, Anne Yatco, Landon McDonald, Khoi Dao, Jonathon Ha join cast ― Netflix revealed on Friday additional English dub cast members for the third episode of the anime of writer Yūki Suenaga... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Akane-banashi Anime Reveals Additional English Dub Cast

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Deaf Crocodile Release Frankenstein, Legend Terror 动画 新作 4K Restoration
item.description: Toei Animation debuted Kyōfu Densetsu: Kaiki! Frankenstein anime special in 1981 ― California-based distribution company Deaf Crocodile announced on Friday that it has licensed the Frankenstein,... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Deaf Crocodile to Release Frankenstein, Legend of Terror Anime With New 4K Restoration
